headline: Eaton (ETN) Is Up 5.1% After Joining Multiple Russell Growth Indices - What's Changed
summary: In late June 2026, Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE: ETN) was added to several major Russell growth benchmarks, including the Russell 1000 Growth, Russell 3000 Growth, Russell 3000E Growth, Russell Top 200 Growth, and the Russell 1000 Growth-Defensive Index. This broad inclusion across multiple Russell growth indices can elevate Eaton’s visibility with benchmark-aware and index-tracking investors, potentially increasing its importance in growth-focused portfolios.
